subcodes.title: Words to Nuru'd-Din Mumtazi et al in May 1920
subcodes.first_line: The affairs of Íran have fallen into the hands of children and those who have no moral compass. Their behavior is such that there is no value or merit in the station of kingship.
subcodes.first_line_orig: کار بدست اطفال افتاده کار به دست بی سر و پاها افتاده از برای سلطان قدری باقی نمانده است
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @predictions and prophecies, @call to action, @spiritual transformation
